synopsis:
**The Voyages of the Greatest of All-Star Cruisers!**

As the legendary Halcyon embarks on a momentous cruise, the ship heads toward a confrontation with the First Order! But what secret from the High Republic era can help the passengers and crew all these years later? And how did Jedi Nibs and Burry fend off a Nihil attack on one of the ship's first ever voyages?
title: Halcyon Legacy
